competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Brahim Díaz (Morocco).
Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by Brahim Díaz.

Attempt saved. Jonathan David (Canada) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is saved in the bottom left corner by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Luc De Fougerolles with a headed pass.

events.description: 乔纳森·戴维射正。 卢克·德富热罗勒参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Canada. Conceded by Yassine Bounou.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by Redouane Halhal.
Issa Diop (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Tani Oluwaseyi (Canada) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Ali Ahmed.

events.description: 塔尼·奥卢瓦塞伊射正。 阿里·艾哈迈德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Tani Oluwaseyi (Canada) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right.

events.description: 塔尼·奥卢瓦塞伊射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Morocco. Ismael Saibari is caught offside.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by Redouane Halhal.
Attempt blocked. Alistair Johnston (Canada) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross.

events.description: 阿利斯泰尔·约翰斯顿射门被封堵。 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Redouane Halhal (Morocco).
Redouane Halhal (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 雷杜安·哈哈尔吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Ismael Saibari (Morocco).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari because of an injury.

events.description: 苏菲安·拉希米替补登场，换下赛巴里。

qualifiers.espnText: Redouane Halhal (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 阿利斯泰尔·约翰斯顿犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Maxime Crépeau (Canada). Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss.

events.description: 苏菲安·拉希米射正。 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi is caught offside.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by Noussair Mazraoui.
Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Achraf Hakimi (Morocco).
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) is shown the yellow card.

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Richie Laryea (Canada) is shown the yellow card.
Foul by Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco).

events.description: 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Brahim Díaz (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Jonathan David (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco).
Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 阿泽丁·欧纳济吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Redouane Halhal (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by Issa Diop.
Attempt missed. Luc De Fougerolles (Canada) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Niko Sigur with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 卢克·德富热罗勒射门偏出。 尼科·西古尔参与进攻。

events.description: 卢克·德富热罗勒吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 1. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi following a set piece situation.

events.description: 阿泽丁·欧纳济破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 2. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Brahim Díaz following a fast break.

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。
